content: AI SDK v6 (ai@latest, 2026): source parts are type='source-url' with sourceId field (not type='source'). convertToModelMessages() is async, must be awaited. useChat from '@ai-sdk/react', DefaultChatTransport from 'ai'. Status: submitted|streaming|ready|error (no isLoading). sendMessage({ text }) for submission.

AI SDK v6 SourceUrlUIPart only carries sourceId/url/title. No custom metadata like favicons. convertToModelMessages is async. useChat status values: submitted|streaming|ready|error. sendMessage({ text }) for submission.

name: ai-sdk-v6-dual-assistant-messages
description: AI SDK 6.x emits two assistant messages per turn when sources stream before text: a source-only ghost message followed by the real content message with reasoning+text+source-url parts. Index-based user/assistant pairing breaks — use order-based walk grouping consecutive assistant messages under their preceding user message, keeping the most content-complete one (has text or reasoning parts).

name: follow-up-query-rewrite
description: Follow-up query rewriting pattern: use generateText (non-streaming) to rephrase context-dependent queries into standalone search queries before calling Tavily. Check messages.filter(m=>m.role==='user').length > 1 to detect follow-ups. Fallback to original query if rewritten text is empty.
